 431 | def tool_web_search(query: str) -> str:
 432 |     headers = {
 433 |         "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 "
 434 |                        "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
 435 |         "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8",
 436 |         "Accept-Language": "id-ID,id;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7",
 437 |     }

 439 |     # ── 1. Coba HTML scrape (hasil lebih kaya) ──
 440 |     try:
 441 |         url  = f"https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q={requests.utils.quote(query)}"
 442 |         resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
 443 |         resp.raise_for_status()
 444 |         raw     = resp.text
 445 |         results = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)</a>', raw, re.DOTALL)
 446 |         titles  = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*>(.*?)</a>', raw, re.DOTALL)
 447 |         def clean(s): return re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', s).strip()
 448 |         items = []
 449 |         for t, r in zip(titles[:5], results[:5]):
 450 |             ct, cr = clean(t), clean(r)
 451 |             if ct or cr:
 452 |                 items.append(f"• {ct}\n  {cr}")
 453 |         if items:
 454 |             return f"🌐 Hasil web search: '{query}'\n\n" + "\n\n".join(items)
 455 |     except requests.exceptions.RequestException:
 456 |         pass  # lanjut ke fallback

 458 |     # ── 2. Fallback: DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API (lebih jarang diblokir) ──
 459 |     try:

 562 | def tool_run_command(command: str, cwd: str = "", timeout: int = 60) -> str:

 569 |     else:
 570 |         run_dir = ALLOWED_ROOT
 571 | 
 572 |     timeout = min(max(int(timeout or 60), 1), 300)  # clamp 1-300 detik
 573 | 
 574 |     print(f"\n  {DIM}Perintah:{R} {YELLOW}{command}{R}")
 575 |     print(f"  {DIM}Direktori:{R} {run_dir}")
 576 |     if not yn(f"AI ingin menjalankan perintah shell di atas"):
 577 |         return "❌ Dibatalkan oleh user."
 578 | 
 579 |     try:
 580 |         result = subprocess.run(
 581 |             command, shell=True, cwd=str(run_dir),
 582 |             capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout,
 583 |             encoding="utf-8", errors="replace",
 584 |         )
 585 |         out = (result.stdout or "") + (result.stderr or "")
 586 |         out = out.strip() or "(tidak ada output)"
 587 |         if len(out) > MAX_CMD_OUTPUT:
 588 |             out = out[:MAX_CMD_OUTPUT] + f"\n... (terpotong, total {len(out):,} karakter)"
 589 |         status = "✅" if result.returncode == 0 else f"⚠️ exit code {result.returncode}"
 590 |         return f"{status}\n$ {command}\n\n{out}"
 591 |     except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
 592 |         return f"❌ Perintah timeout setelah {timeout} detik: {command}"
 593 |     except Exception as e:

 611 | def call_api_stream(model: str, messages: list, use_tools: bool = True):
 612 |     """Generator: yield potongan JSON dari respons stream Ollama (NDJSON)."""
 613 |     body = {
 614 |         "model":    model,
 615 |         "messages": messages,
 616 |         "stream":   True,
 617 |         "options":  {"num_predict": 4096},
 618 |     }
 619 |     if use_tools:
 620 |         body["tools"] = TOOLS
 621 | 
 622 |     resp = requests.post(OLLAMA_URL, json=body, timeout=120, stream=True)
 623 |     if not resp.ok:
 624 |         raise ValueError(f"HTTP {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}")
 625 | 
 626 |     for line in resp.iter_lines():
 627 |         if not line:
 628 |             continue
 629 |         try:
 630 |             yield json.loads(line.decode("utf-8"))
 631 |         except json.JSONDecodeError:
 632 |             continue
 633 | 
 634 | 
 635 | def process_response(api_key: str, model: str, messages: list) -> str:
 636 |     """Agentic loop dengan streaming: print teks live, handle tool_calls."""
 637 |     while True:
 638 |         full_content = ""
 639 |         tool_calls    = []
 640 |         printed_label = False
 641 | 
 642 |         for chunk in call_api_stream(model, messages):
 643 |             msg = chunk.get("message", {})
 644 | 
 645 |             # Streaming teks → print langsung token-per-token
 646 |             piece = msg.get("content", "")
 647 |             if piece:
 648 |                 if not printed_label:
 649 |                     print(f"\n{CYAN}{BOLD}AI ▸{R} ", end="", flush=True)
 650 |                     printed_label = True
 651 |                 print(piece, end="", flush=True)
 652 |                 full_content += piece
 653 | 
 654 |             # tool_calls biasanya muncul utuh di chunk terakhir
 655 |             if msg.get("tool_calls"):
 656 |                 tool_calls = msg["tool_calls"]
 657 | 
 658 |             if chunk.get("done"):
 659 |                 break
 660 | 
 661 |         if printed_label:
 662 |             print()  # newline setelah selesai streaming teks
 663 | 
 664 |         # Susun pesan assistant lengkap untuk history
 665 |         assistant_msg = {"role": "assistant", "content": full_content}
 666 |         if tool_calls:
 667 |             assistant_msg["tool_calls"] = tool_calls
 668 |         messages.append(assistant_msg)
 669 | 
 670 |         # Kalau tidak ada tool call → selesai, kembalikan teks (sudah diprint)
 671 |         if not tool_calls:
 672 |             if VOICE_ENABLED and full_content.strip():
 673 |                 status = speak_text(full_content)
 674 |                 if status.startswith("❌"):
 675 |                     print(f"  {DIM}{status}{R}")
 676 |             return ""  # konten sudah diprint live, tidak perlu diprint ulang
 677 | 
 678 |         # Eksekusi semua tool calls
 679 |         for tc in tool_calls:
 680 |             # Ollama: tc["function"]["name"] dan tc["function"]["arguments"] (dict langsung)
 681 |             fn_name = tc["function"]["name"]
 682 |             fn_args = tc["function"].get("arguments", {})
 683 |             if isinstance(fn_args, str):
 684 |                 try:
 685 |                     fn_args = json.loads(fn_args)
 686 |                 except Exception:
 687 |                     fn_args = {}
 688 | 
 689 |             # Tampilkan apa yang AI lakukan
 690 |             print(f"\n  {MAGENTA}🔧 {fn_name}{R}({DIM}{', '.join(f'{k}={repr(v)[:60]}' for k,v in fn_args.items())}{R})")
 691 | 
 692 |             if fn_name in TOOL_MAP:
 693 |                 result = TOOL_MAP[fn_name](fn_args)
 694 |             else:
 695 |                 result = f"❌ Tool tidak dikenal: {fn_name}"
 696 | 
 697 |             # Tampilkan preview hasil
 698 |             preview = result[:200].replace("\n", " ")
 699 |             print(f"  {DIM}→ {preview}{'...' if len(result)>200 else ''}{R}\n")
 700 | 
 701 |             # Kirim hasil tool ke messages (format Ollama)
 702 |             messages.append({
 703 |                 "role":    "tool",
 704 |                 "content": result,
 705 |             })

 322 | def tool_read_file(path: str) -> str:
 323 |     p, err = check_path(path)
 324 |     if err: return err
 325 |     if not p.exists():    return f"❌ File tidak ditemukan: {p}"
 326 |     if not p.is_file():   return f"❌ Bukan file: {p}"
 327 |     size = p.stat().st_size
 328 |     if size > MAX_FILE_BYTES:
 329 |         return f"❌ File terlalu besar ({size:,} bytes). Maksimum {MAX_FILE_BYTES:,} bytes."
 330 |     try:
 331 |         content = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 332 |         lines   = content.splitlines()
 333 |         numbered = "\n".join(f"{i+1:>4} | {l}" for i, l in enumerate(lines))
 334 |         return f"📄 {p} ({len(lines)} baris)\n\n{numbered}"
 335 |     except Exception as e:
 336 |         return f"❌ Gagal membaca: {e}"

 349 |         lines = content.count("\n") + 1
 350 |         return f"✅ File {'ditimpa' if exists else 'dibuat'}: {p} ({lines} baris)"
 351 |     except Exception as e:

 380 | def tool_list_dir(path: str = ".", recursive: bool = False) -> str:
 381 |     p, err = check_path(path)
 382 |     if err: return err
 383 |     if not p.exists():   return f"❌ Path tidak ditemukan: {p}"
 384 |     if not p.is_dir():   return f"❌ Bukan direktori: {p}"
 385 |     try:
 386 |         entries = []
 387 |         if recursive:
 388 |             for item in sorted(p.rglob("*")):
 389 |                 rel  = item.relative_to(p)
 390 |                 icon = "📁" if item.is_dir() else "📄"
 391 |                 size = f"  {item.stat().st_size:>8,} B" if item.is_file() else ""
 392 |                 entries.append(f"{icon} {rel}{size}")
 393 |         else:
 394 |             for item in sorted(p.iterdir()):
 395 |                 icon = "📁" if item.is_dir() else "📄"
 396 |                 size = f"  {item.stat().st_size:>8,} B" if item.is_file() else ""
 397 |                 entries.append(f"{icon} {item.name}{size}")
 398 |         if not entries: return f"📂 {p} (kosong)"
 399 |         return f"📂 {p} ({len(entries)} item)\n\n" + "\n".join(entries)
 400 |     except Exception as e:
 401 |         return f"❌ Gagal: {e}"

 404 | def tool_search_in_files(pattern: str, directory: str = ".", extension: str = "") -> str:
 405 |     base, err = check_path(directory)
 406 |     if err: return err
 407 |     if not base.exists(): return f"❌ Direktori tidak ditemukan: {base}"
 408 |     results = []
 409 |     glob = f"*{extension}" if extension else "*"
 410 |     try:
 411 |         files = [f for f in base.rglob(glob) if f.is_file() and f.stat().st_size < MAX_FILE_BYTES]
 412 |         for fpath in sorted(files)[:50]:
 413 |             try:
 414 |                 text = fpath.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
 415 |                 for i, line in enumerate(text.splitlines(), 1):
 416 |                     if re.search(pattern, line, re.IGNORECASE):
 417 |                         rel = fpath.relative_to(base)
 418 |                         results.append(f"{rel}:{i}: {line.strip()}")
 419 |             except Exception:
 420 |                 continue
 421 |         if not results:
 422 |             return f"🔍 Tidak ada hasil untuk '{pattern}' di {base}"
 423 |         out = "\n".join(results[:80])
 424 |         if len(out) > MAX_SEARCH_CHARS:
 425 |             out = out[:MAX_SEARCH_CHARS] + "\n... (terpotong)"
 426 |         return f"🔍 {len(results)} hasil untuk '{pattern}':\n\n{out}"
 427 |     except Exception as e:
 428 |         return f"❌ Error pencarian: {e}"

 431 | def tool_web_search(query: str) -> str:
 432 |     headers = {
 433 |         "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 "
 434 |                        "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
 435 |         "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8",
 436 |         "Accept-Language": "id-ID,id;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7",
 437 |     }
 438 | 
 439 |     # ── 1. Coba HTML scrape (hasil lebih kaya) ──
 440 |     try:
 441 |         url  = f"https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q={requests.utils.quote(query)}"
 442 |         resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
 443 |         resp.raise_for_status()
 444 |         raw     = resp.text
 445 |         results = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)</a>', raw, re.DOTALL)
 446 |         titles  = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*>(.*?)</a>', raw, re.DOTALL)
 447 |         def clean(s): return re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', s).strip()
 448 |         items = []
 449 |         for t, r in zip(titles[:5], results[:5]):
 450 |             ct, cr = clean(t), clean(r)
 451 |             if ct or cr:
 452 |                 items.append(f"• {ct}\n  {cr}")
 453 |         if items:
 454 |             return f"🌐 Hasil web search: '{query}'\n\n" + "\n\n".join(items)
 455 |     except requests.exceptions.RequestException:
 456 |         pass  # lanjut ke fallback
 457 | 
 458 |     # ── 2. Fallback: DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API (lebih jarang diblokir) ──
 459 |     try:
 460 |         url  = "https://api.duckduckgo.com/"
 461 |         resp = requests.get(url, params={
 462 |             "q": query, "format": "json", "no_html": "1", "skip_disambig": "1"
 463 |         }, headers=headers, timeout=10)
 464 |         resp.raise_for_status()
 465 |         data = resp.json()
 466 |         items = []
 467 |         if data.get("AbstractText"):
 468 |             items.append(f"• {data.get('Heading', query)}\n  {data['AbstractText']}")
 469 |         for topic in data.get("RelatedTopics", [])[:5]:
 470 |             if isinstance(topic, dict) and topic.get("Text"):
 471 |                 items.append(f"• {topic['Text']}")
 472 |         if items:
 473 |             return f"🌐 Hasil web search: '{query}'\n\n" + "\n\n".join(items[:5])
 474 |         return f"🌐 Tidak ada hasil untuk: {query}"
 475 |     except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError as e:
 476 |         return (f"❌ Web search gagal: tidak bisa terhubung ke internet "
 477 |                 f"(cek koneksi/firewall/DNS).\nDetail: {e}")
 478 |     except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
 479 |         return "❌ Web search gagal: timeout, coba lagi."
 480 |     except Exception as e:
 481 |         return f"❌ Web search gagal: {e}"

 497 | def tool_open_app(target: str, args: list = None) -> str:
 498 |     import shutil, platform
 499 |     args = args or []
 500 |     system = platform.system()  # Windows / Darwin / Linux
 501 | 
 502 |     # Alias nama populer → perintah nyata
 503 |     ALIASES = {
 504 |         # Windows
 505 |         "notepad":    "notepad.exe",
 506 |         "explorer":   "explorer.exe",
 507 |         "cmd":        "cmd.exe",
 508 |         "powershell": "powershell.exe",
 509 |         "calc":       "calc.exe",
 510 |         "paint":      "mspaint.exe",
 511 |         "taskmgr":    "taskmgr.exe",
 512 |         # Cross-platform
 513 |         "chrome":     "google-chrome" if system != "Windows" else "chrome",
 514 |         "firefox":    "firefox",
 515 |         "code":       "code",
 516 |         "vscode":     "code",
 517 |         "cursor":     "cursor",
 518 |         "sublime":    "subl",
 519 |         "vim":        "vim",
 520 |         "nano":       "nano",
 521 |     }
 522 | 
 523 |     resolved = ALIASES.get(target.lower(), target)
 524 | 
 525 |     # Kalau URL → buka di browser default
 526 |     if target.startswith("http://") or target.startswith("https://"):
 527 |         import webbrowser
 528 |         webbrowser.open(target)
 529 |         return f"✅ Membuka URL di browser: {target}"
 530 | 
 531 |     # Kalau path file/folder
 532 |     p = Path(target).expanduser()
 533 |     if p.exists():
 534 |         if system == "Windows":
 535 |             os.startfile(str(p))
 536 |         elif system == "Darwin":
 537 |             subprocess.Popen(["open", str(p)])
 538 |         else:
 539 |             subprocess.Popen(["xdg-open", str(p)])
 540 |         return f"✅ Membuka: {p}"
 541 | 
 542 |     # Buka sebagai aplikasi
 543 |     try:
 544 |         if system == "Windows":
 545 |             cmd = ["start", "", resolved] + args
 546 |             subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True)
 547 |         elif system == "Darwin":
 548 |             cmd = ["open", "-a", resolved] + args
 549 |             subprocess.Popen(cmd)
 550 |         else:
 551 |             cmd = [resolved] + args
 552 |             if not shutil.which(resolved):
 553 |                 return f"❌ Aplikasi tidak ditemukan: {resolved}"
 554 |             subprocess.Popen(cmd)
 555 |         return f"✅ Membuka aplikasi: {resolved}" + (f" dengan argumen: {args}" if args else "")
 556 |     except Exception as e:
 557 |         return f"❌ Gagal membuka '{target}': {e}"

 562 | def tool_run_command(command: str, cwd: str = "", timeout: int = 60) -> str:

 571 | 
 572 |     timeout = min(max(int(timeout or 60), 1), 300)  # clamp 1-300 detik

 574 |     print(f"\n  {DIM}Perintah:{R} {YELLOW}{command}{R}")
 575 |     print(f"  {DIM}Direktori:{R} {run_dir}")
 576 |     if not yn(f"AI ingin menjalankan perintah shell di atas"):
 577 |         return "❌ Dibatalkan oleh user."
 578 | 
 579 |     try:
 580 |         result = subprocess.run(
 581 |             command, shell=True, cwd=str(run_dir),
 582 |             capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout,
 583 |             encoding="utf-8", errors="replace",
 584 |         )
 585 |         out = (result.stdout or "") + (result.stderr or "")
 586 |         out = out.strip() or "(tidak ada output)"
 587 |         if len(out) > MAX_CMD_OUTPUT:
 588 |             out = out[:MAX_CMD_OUTPUT] + f"\n... (terpotong, total {len(out):,} karakter)"
 589 |         status = "✅" if result.returncode == 0 else f"⚠️ exit code {result.returncode}"
 590 |         return f"{status}\n$ {command}\n\n{out}"
 591 |     except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
 592 |         return f"❌ Perintah timeout setelah {timeout} detik: {command}"
 593 |     except Exception as e:
 594 |         return f"❌ Gagal menjalankan perintah: {e}"

 611 | def call_api_stream(model: str, messages: list, use_tools: bool = True):
 612 |     """Generator: yield potongan JSON dari respons stream Ollama (NDJSON)."""
 613 |     body = {
 614 |         "model":    model,
 615 |         "messages": messages,
 616 |         "stream":   True,
 617 |         "options":  {"num_predict": 4096},
 618 |     }
 619 |     if use_tools:
 620 |         body["tools"] = TOOLS
 621 | 
 622 |     resp = requests.post(OLLAMA_URL, json=body, timeout=120, stream=True)
 623 |     if not resp.ok:
 624 |         raise ValueError(f"HTTP {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}")
 625 | 
 626 |     for line in resp.iter_lines():
 627 |         if not line:
 628 |             continue
 629 |         try:
 630 |             yield json.loads(line.decode("utf-8"))
 631 |         except json.JSONDecodeError:
 632 |             continue

 635 | def process_response(api_key: str, model: str, messages: list) -> str:
 636 |     """Agentic loop dengan streaming: print teks live, handle tool_calls."""
 637 |     while True:
 638 |         full_content = ""
 639 |         tool_calls    = []
 640 |         printed_label = False
 641 | 
 642 |         for chunk in call_api_stream(model, messages):
 643 |             msg = chunk.get("message", {})
 644 | 
 645 |             # Streaming teks → print langsung token-per-token
 646 |             piece = msg.get("content", "")
 647 |             if piece:
 648 |                 if not printed_label:
 649 |                     print(f"\n{CYAN}{BOLD}AI ▸{R} ", end="", flush=True)
 650 |                     printed_label = True
 651 |                 print(piece, end="", flush=True)
 652 |                 full_content += piece
 653 | 
 654 |             # tool_calls biasanya muncul utuh di chunk terakhir
 655 |             if msg.get("tool_calls"):
 656 |                 tool_calls = msg["tool_calls"]
 657 | 
 658 |             if chunk.get("done"):
 659 |                 break
 660 | 
 661 |         if printed_label:
 662 |             print()  # newline setelah selesai streaming teks
 663 | 
 664 |         # Susun pesan assistant lengkap untuk history
 665 |         assistant_msg = {"role": "assistant", "content": full_content}
 666 |         if tool_calls:
 667 |             assistant_msg["tool_calls"] = tool_calls
 668 |         messages.append(assistant_msg)
 669 | 
 670 |         # Kalau tidak ada tool call → selesai, kembalikan teks (sudah diprint)
 671 |         if not tool_calls:
 672 |             if VOICE_ENABLED and full_content.strip():
 673 |                 status = speak_text(full_content)
 674 |                 if status.startswith("❌"):
 675 |                     print(f"  {DIM}{status}{R}")
 676 |             return ""  # konten sudah diprint live, tidak perlu diprint ulang
 677 | 
 678 |         # Eksekusi semua tool calls
 679 |         for tc in tool_calls:
 680 |             # Ollama: tc["function"]["name"] dan tc["function"]["arguments"] (dict langsung)
 681 |             fn_name = tc["function"]["name"]
 682 |             fn_args = tc["function"].get("arguments", {})
 683 |             if isinstance(fn_args, str):
 684 |                 try:
 685 |                     fn_args = json.loads(fn_args)
 686 |                 except Exception:
 687 |                     fn_args = {}
 688 | 
 689 |             # Tampilkan apa yang AI lakukan
 690 |             print(f"\n  {MAGENTA}🔧 {fn_name}{R}({DIM}{', '.join(f'{k}={repr(v)[:60]}' for k,v in fn_args.items())}{R})")
 691 | 
 692 |             if fn_name in TOOL_MAP:
 693 |                 result = TOOL_MAP[fn_name](fn_args)
 694 |             else:
 695 |                 result = f"❌ Tool tidak dikenal: {fn_name}"
 696 |

def check_path(path: str) -> tuple[Path, str]:
    """Resolve path & pastikan berada di dalam ALLOWED_ROOT.
    Return (resolved_path, error_msg). error_msg kosong jika aman."""
    p = Path(path).expanduser()
    if not p.is_absolute():
        p = (ALLOWED_ROOT / p)
    p = p.resolve()
    try:
        p.relative_to(ALLOWED_ROOT)
    except ValueError:
        return p, f"❌ Akses ditolak: '{p}' berada di luar direktori yang diizinkan ({ALLOWED_ROOT})"

PERSONA_NAMA   = "My AI Router"

# ─── OpenRouter API ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def call_api_stream(api_key: str, model: str, messages: list, use_tools: bool = True):
    """Generator: yield potongan JSON dari respons stream OpenRouter (SSE)."""
    headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "HTTP-Referer": "http://localhost",
        "X-Title": "My AI Router CLI"
    }

    body = {
        "model": model,
        "messages": messages,
        "stream": True,
        "max_tokens": 4096,
    }
    
    if use_tools:
        body["tools"] = TOOLS

    resp = requests.post(
        OPENROUTER_URL,
        headers=headers,
        json=body,
        stream=True,
        timeout=120
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()

    for line in resp.iter_lines():
        if not line:
            continue

        line = line.decode("utf-8")
        if not line.startswith("data: "):
            continue

        data = line[6:]
        if data == "[DONE]":
            break

        try:
            chunk = json.loads(data)
            yield chunk
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

def process_response(api_key: str, model: str, messages: list) -> str:
    """Agentic loop dengan streaming untuk OpenRouter: print teks live, handle tool_calls."""
    # (Implementasi mirip dengan main.py, tapi disesuaikan untuk OpenRouter)
    while True:
        full_content = ""
        tool_calls    = []
        printed_label = False

        for chunk in call_api_stream(api_key, model, messages):
            # Ekstrak data dari chunk OpenRouter
            choices = chunk.get("choices", [{}])
            msg = choices[0].get("delta", {})

            # Streaming teks
            piece = msg.get("content", "")
            if piece:
                if not printed_label:
                    print(f"\n{CYAN}{BOLD}AI Router ▸{R} ", end="", flush=True)
                    printed_label = True
                print(piece, end="", flush=True)
                full_content += piece

            # Tool calls
            if msg.get("tool_calls"):
                tool_calls = msg["tool_calls"]

            # Cek apakah stream selesai
            if choices[0].get("finish_reason") == "stop":
                break

        if printed_label:
            print()  # newline setelah selesai streaming teks

        # Susun pesan assistant lengkap untuk history
        assistant_msg = {"role": "assistant", "content": full_content}
        if tool_calls:
            assistant_msg["tool_calls"] = tool_calls
        messages.append(assistant_msg)

        # Lanjutkan logika yang sama seperti di main.py untuk tool calls

        if not tool_calls:
            return ""  # konten sudah diprint live

# Fungsi-fungsi lain seperti di main.py (load_config, save_config, dll)
# disesuaikan dengan kebutuhan OpenRouter

def load_config() -> dict:
    return {
        "api_key": os.environ.get("OPENROUTER_API_KEY", ""),
        "default_model": os.environ.get("MY_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL", "mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free"),
    }

def save_config(data: dict):
    # Sama seperti di main.py, tapi fokus pada OPENROUTER_API_KEY
    env_file = Path(__file__).parent / ".env"
    try:
        lines = env_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines() if env_file.exists() else []
        for key, val in data.items():
            env_key = {
                "api_key": "OPENROUTER_API_KEY",
                "default_model": "MY_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL",
            }.get(key, key.upper())
            
            # Logika update/tambah line di .env file
            found = False
            for i, line in enumerate(lines):
                if line.startswith(f"{env_key}="):
                    lines[i] = f"{env_key}={val}"
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                lines.append(f"{env_key}={val}")
        
        env_file.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    except Exception:
        pass

def pilih_model(default_model: str = "") -> tuple:
    """Pilih model OpenRouter."""
    options = MODELS.copy()
    custom_key = str(len(options) + 1)

    # Cari nomor default
    default_key = next((k for k,(mid,_) in options.items() if mid == default_model), "1")

    print(f"{BOLD}Pilih model OpenRouter:{R}")
    for k,(mid,desc) in options.items():
